title: VurdictAIResponseSchema
description: Structured JSON response format returned by the Gemini/Claude Service after case study evaluation.

scratchpad.description: A detailed step-by-step reasoning and analysis of the portfolio content. You MUST fill this out before determining the overall score or dimension scores.

overall_score.description: The aggregated score (0-100) representing overall case study readiness based on the selected goal weights.

categories.description: Evaluation breakdown across the six hiring/client dimensions.

explanation.description: Constructive lead-level feedback explaining the score from the context of the user's career goal.
Constructive lead-level feedback explaining the score.
Constructive lead-level feedback explaining the score.
Constructive lead-level feedback explaining the score.
Constructive lead-level feedback explaining the score.
Constructive lead-level feedback explaining the score.

fix_this_first.description: The single highest-priority recommendation identified for immediate optimization.

title.description: A short, actionable title for the recommendation.

description.description: Details outlining what the blocker is, why it is critical, and specifically how to resolve it.

priority_score.description: Priority score of the fix from 1 (low) to 10 (high blocker).

summary.description: A high-level executive summary of the case study evaluation, explaining key strengths and the primary bottlenecks.

priority_action_plan.description: Prioritized action recommendations derived from the evaluation findings, ranked by impact.

critical_fixes.description: Highest-impact improvements most likely to affect outcomes. Maximum 3 items.

description.description: Why this matters and how to address it.

medium_priority.description: Valuable enhancements that strengthen the case study. Maximum 3 items.

description.description: Why this matters and how to address it.

nice_to_have.description: Optional refinements for further polish. Maximum 3 items.

description.description: Why this matters and how to address it.
